name: Calypso and.. WHO???
description:
this takes place AFTER you fight the big evil ancient and are in the cutscene with her and.. what? who's that? isn't he supposed to be DEAD?!!??!

yeah, you heard me right. i brought captain trotter back to flame you for interrupting calypso's sob story to talk about a "sugar apple in stock" while she was pouring her heart out to you. be prepared for trouble.. and MAKE IT DOUBLE!!!!

YES THE FRIEND IS MY OC, YES THIS IS MEANT TO TARGET TOMMY.
creator: gorygooner
